title: draba aurea var. aureiformis
intro: Draba aurea var. aureiformis, also known as golden whitlow grass, is a rare, golden-yellow flowering plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of golden whitlow grass include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Golden whitlow grass can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
